formattedAddress: 1 Nikole Ljubibratića, Herceg - Novi 85340, Црна Гора

text.text:
⚠️ Danas smo bili na rutinskom pregledu kod pedijatra Olivera Mentović sa bebom od 8 mjeseci. Tokom pregleda doktorka je bez upozorenja i bez mog pristanka silom povukla kožicu sa glavića penisa djeteta. To se desilo toliko brzo da nisam ni stigla da je zaustavim. Bilo je očigledno da je primijenila priličnu silu. Dijete je osjetilo bol i odmah je zaplakalo.

Doktorka je rekla da to treba raditi redovno. Međutim, nakon pregleda kod kuće sam primijetila crvenilo, pukotine na koži, a kasnije i žućkasti iscjedak na peleni. Konsultovala sam se sa drugim, privatnim pedijatrom, koji je objasnio da se kod beba to ne smije raditi jer može dovesti do povrede i stvaranja ožiljaka. Morali smo da počnemo da koristimo mast kako bismo spriječili upalu i pomogli koži da zaraste, jer su se već pojavila oštećenja koja liče na ožiljke.

Ispada da nakon običnog planiranog pregleda sada moramo da rješavamo posljedice povrede kod djeteta.

Želim da upozorim druge roditelje: ako vaše dijete ide kod ovog doktora, molim vas da pažljivo pratite šta radi tokom pregleda i ne dozvolite ovakve manipulacije bez vašeg pristanka.

Takođe želim da napomenem da pregledi kod ovog doktora često kasne. Nekoliko puta se osjetio miris cigareta od doktorke, a nisam primijetila da je oprala ruke prije pregleda.

⚠️ Iskreno se nadam da će uprava klinike obratiti pažnju na ovakve situacije, jer se radi o zdravlju male djece.

text.text:
During my trip, I got sick and was told that I needed to go to the emergency room. As soon as I arrived, everyone was very helpful and friendly. The doctor who examined me spoke very good English and even cracked some jokes. Puno hvala!

P.S. Don’t forget to bring your passport!

text.text:
Jedna zvezdica isključivo zbog ophođenja psihologa Jelene Pejovic prilikom posete za produžetak vozačke dozvole. Njena nekultura, njen način razgovora koji je uvredljivog tona i njena nadmenost koja se karakterise u odgovoru "zato što sam ja tako rekla" na postavljeno pitanje "zbog čega je burno odreagovala kad sam pokucala u 10h i pitala da li je i ovde pauza, tj da li je svima pauza" je nešto što ni jednu osobu, koja vrši funkciju na toj poziciji ne bi trebalo da karakteriše.

Za sve ostale zaposlene koje sam srela tog dana imam samo pohvale

text.text: Kad god mi je trebala usluga izab. doktora da se zakazem ,svi termini su bili zauzeti najmanje 5 dana unaprijed ili više. Uvijek je tako. Zakazuju sami sebe radnici DZ, prijatelji, poznanici, uzimaju termine, vidi se na monitoru ko je. Mi ostali neka crknemo ili da čekamo satima pod temperaturom i groznicom da nas doktor pregleda.

text.text: When coming down with a really bad case of tonsillitis in Montenegro I was really scared, I would say it’s the worst bout of tonsillitis I’ve ever had. Luckily we were close to the health centre, so my friend took me there. Whilst acknowledging that hospitals in every country are different (quite different to uk for people travelling from uk to Montenegro), I was pleasantly surprised. Everyone spoke enough English to get by, the doctor I spoke to was as thorough as my local GP would’ve been, and I got my treatment without any long waits or inconveniences. The treatment was affordable, less than I expected. One note is that it seems you need to knock on the door number you’re given if nobody is already noticeably waiting there. If you do happen to be unlucky enough to need to seek medical help I’d recommend this centre. I was treated with 3x Penicillin injections over 3 days and they were really cautious about allergies and making sure I waited for a few minutes after having the injection done. Thank you to everyone who helped!

originalText.text: When coming down with a really bad case of tonsillitis in Montenegro I was really scared, I would say it’s the worst bout of tonsillitis I’ve ever had. Luckily we were close to the health centre, so my friend took me there. Whilst acknowledging that hospitals in every country are different (quite different to uk for people travelling from uk to Montenegro), I was pleasantly surprised. Everyone spoke enough English to get by, the doctor I spoke to was as thorough as my local GP would’ve been, and I got my treatment without any long waits or inconveniences. The treatment was affordable, less than I expected. One note is that it seems you need to knock on the door number you’re given if nobody is already noticeably waiting there. If you do happen to be unlucky enough to need to seek medical help I’d recommend this centre. I was treated with 3x Penicillin injections over 3 days and they were really cautious about allergies and making sure I waited for a few minutes after having the injection done. Thank you to everyone who helped!

text.text: My friend had worsening tonsillitis, she was seen within an hour by a doctor, she was assessed and given an injection with antibiotics, we returned for 2 more days to continue the course and was given a prescription for 7 more days worth of oral antibiotics to complete a 10 day course. All of that for €24 and €9 for the prescription ! An easy process and staff spoke good English.

All of that for €24 and €9 for the prescription ! An easy process and staff spoke good English.

text.text:
Zelim javno da zahvalim i pohvalim zaposlene u domu zdravlja Herceg Novi,koji su pomogli mojoj majci jutros kad joj je pozlilo.Ukazali su joj odmah pomoc,brinuli se oko nje,toliko su joj paznje i ljudskosti ukazali da se to rijecima ne moze opisati.Sta reci,osim napisati za njih da su ljudi velikog srca i duse,humanisti.
Ivanka Ćosović-med.sestra
Dr.Zgradić
Dr.Tamara Piljević
Irma-med.sestra
Hvala vam dobri ljudi 🙏

text.text:
Über die extrem lange Wartezeiten können wir hinweg sehen, da wie vermutlich überall das Personal im Gesundheitswesen knapp ist und wir ohne Termin einen Arztbesuch brauchten.
Was in unseren Augen jedoch bei einer medizinischen Einrichtung ein absolutes No-Go ist sind unhygienische sanitäre Anlagen: Kein Klopapier, keine Seife, keine Handtücher, extrem alte und schmutzige Toiletten, nicht abschließbare Kabinen. Auch der Wartebereich ist deutlich in die Jahre gekommen: abgerazte schmutzige Plastikstühle.

originalText.text:

Auch der Wartebereich ist deutlich in die Jahre gekommen: abgerazte schmutzige Plastikstühle.

text.text: We arrived in Montenegro less that 24 hours ago, I needed a General practitioner and was advised by locals to go here. I was seen within 10 minutes by a GP, the consultation was 25 Euros & Prescription 9 Euros which in my opinion is excellent. The doctor spoke good English and everyone was super helpful even if there was a language barrier.

The doctor spoke good English and everyone was super helpful even if there was a language barrier.

text.text:
Разное пишут про Dom zdravlja в Херцег Нови. Мне всегда удаётся сделать всё необходимое быстро. Персонал вежлив и терпелив,  всё объясняют и показывают от начала и до конца.
Но лучше быть здоровым и богатым,  как известно. Хотя бы для того, чтобы забраться на вершину, где расположилась поликлиника, потребуется сила легкоатлета.
Мест на парковке крайне мало!

text.text: If you need to make a COVID PCR test, you have to register yourself in the tourist office first, after take an appointment in the hospital for the next days to do the test and it will be ready after one more day, in 48 hour. They do not have rapid antigen test. No information on their website. All is very confusing, so be ready to spend a long time for that.

originalText.text: If you need to make a COVID PCR test, you have to register yourself in the tourist office first, after take an appointment in the hospital for the next days to do the test and it will be ready after one more day, in 48 hour. They do not have rapid antigen test. No information on their website. All is very confusing, so be ready to spend a long time for that.

text.text: 24 евро приём немного дорого, для туриста. Но, само обслуживание в целом порадовало,у дочки заболел животик, осмотрели назначили лечение и все прошло.

originalText.text: 24 евро приём немного дорого, для туриста. Но, само обслуживание в целом порадовало,у дочки заболел животик, осмотрели назначили лечение и все прошло.

text.text: Well staff is arrogant and rude even if you are polite and respectful. Psychiatrists are a disaster, they simply refuse to listen or help. Doctors treat people like livestock, some deserve that, but not everyone. And I know that their personal life is their own business, but one of the nurses have a side job as an "escort" in Kotor. I found out this by accident, and really don't care what they do in their private time, but that is just absurd. The amount of paperwork for the simplest things is huge, unless you're a cousin, or at least a friend of a distant cousin, or they often see you at the grocery store, why not? Then it goes smoothly. There is only one good doctor there, but, naturally, it is really hard to get to him.

text.text: A dobar je...

originalText.text: A dobar je...

text.text:
Мы пользовались услугами детского врача и медсестры когда в больнице Мелине у нас родился сын. Сестра Гоца приезжала к нам домой, проверяла состояние не только ребёнка, но и моё, была вежлива, легка в общении, проконсультировала нас по всем вопросам.   Доктор Ментович - очень приятная женщина, квалифицированная и неконфликтная, правда она немного повернута на обязательности прививок, но это не главное, здесь люди даже штрафы по 500 евро платят за пропуск прививки. Но мы так и не дались, Слава богу гражданство у ребёнка российское.
Хотя есть одна особенность у черногорских врачей - они выполняют свою работу и не смотрят что в этот момент происходит с пациентом.  Когда вы пойдёте не приём, забудьте о клиентоориентированном подходе и заботе о вашем тонком внутренем мире. Вам будет и больно и не приятно, но это не волнует доктора, он делает свою работу и делает хорошо, ну и что, что вам не комфортно, главное - результат!
